analyses.name: Alphabet Inc.
analyses.verdict: The cleanest mega-cap breakout setup — Gemini/cloud momentum with earnings inflecting and a still-reasonable multiple.

financials.summary: Record year: search held up while Google Cloud swung firmly profitable and AI monetization began flowing through the P&L, driving outsized EPS growth on a still-reasonable valuation.
highlights: Google Cloud sustained profitability and backlog growth
Forward P/E ~25x — inexpensive for the growth
Massive operating cash flow funding AI capex + buybacks

accomplishments: Gemini model family rolled across Search, Workspace and Cloud
Continued share repurchases and first-ever/again-growing capital returns

journey_52w.summary: Ground higher through the year as the AI narrative shifted from 'threat to search' to 'Gemini is a winner,' with cloud profitability the proof point. Now consolidating in a tight base ~7% off its high.

milestones.label: Late 2025
milestones.note: Cloud profitability and Gemini adoption re-rated the stock

milestones.label: 2026 YTD
milestones.note: New highs, then a tight VCP consolidation into mid-July

risks: Heavy AI capex pressuring near-term free cash flow
watch: Breakout above the ~$385-390 pivot on volume
critical.valuation: ~25x forward earnings — undemanding versus ~20%+ revenue and ~80% EPS growth; TradingView independently rates it Strong Buy.

analyses.name: NVIDIA Corporation
analyses.verdict: AI-infrastructure bellwether pulled back into a buyable base — unmatched growth at a surprisingly modest multiple.

financials.summary: Data-center dominance drove another year of triple-digit earnings growth as hyperscaler and enterprise AI demand outstripped supply; gross margins stayed exceptional.
highlights: Data-center segment the overwhelming revenue driver

journey_52w.summary: A leadership year with sharp swings — repeated new highs punctuated by ~10-20% capex-fear pullbacks. Currently ~10% off its high in a constructive VCP with RSI ~62.

milestones.note: Blackwell ramp and record data-center revenue

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: Semi group pulled back; NVDA basing near the 50-day

risks: Hyperscaler capex digestion is the key swing factor
critical.valuation: ~16.6x forward earnings is cheap for +85% revenue growth; TradingView rates it Strong Buy.

analyses.name: Amazon.com, Inc.
analyses.verdict: AWS re-acceleration plus retail-margin expansion; a warm-but-healthy pullback into a base.

financials.summary: Operating income surged as AWS re-accelerated and North America retail margins expanded on logistics efficiency and a fast-growing, high-margin advertising business.

accomplishments: Advertising scaled to a major profit engine

journey_52w.summary: Steady uptrend on the margin story, now ~7% off its high with RSI ~72. A classic strong-stock pullback rather than a breakdown.

milestones.note: AWS growth re-accelerated; margins inflected higher

milestones.label: 2026 YTD
milestones.note: New highs, then a modest pullback into a base

watch: Reclaim of the high on volume
critical.valuation: ~26x forward earnings against +75% EPS growth; TradingView rates it Strong Buy.

analyses.name: Apple Inc.
analyses.verdict: At all-time highs with top-rank relative strength — a buy-into-strength for trend followers, but extended, so respect the stop.

financials.summary: Record revenue led by Services, which continued to expand margins; iPhone held up and the installed base kept growing, supporting durable cash generation and buybacks.

accomplishments: Apple-silicon roadmap and on-device AI push

journey_52w.summary: Climbed to fresh all-time highs with RS at the top of the tape; currently extended (RSI ~70) at the high rather than basing.

milestones.note: Services strength and AI features drove the re-rating

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: Broke to new all-time highs

catalysts: AI feature adoption / new hardware cycle
watch: Whether it holds the breakout or pulls back to the 50-day
critical.valuation: Premium ~34x forward multiple; TradingView rates it Strong Buy — technicals and quant agree, but the entry is extended.

analyses.name: Eli Lilly and Company
analyses.verdict: GLP-1 franchise leader in a calm base with explosive earnings growth and room to run.

financials.summary: Incretin franchise (tirzepatide) drove revenue up over 50% and EPS up ~170% as manufacturing capacity scaled to meet obesity/diabetes demand.

accomplishments: Advancing oral GLP-1 and next-gen incretin pipeline

journey_52w.summary: Volatile but upward, with the obesity TAM debate driving swings; now ~6% off its high in a constructive VCP with RSI ~56 — un-extended.

milestones.note: Record incretin revenue and margin expansion

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: Consolidating just below highs, RSI reset to mid-50s

risks: GLP-1 competitive dynamics (incl. orals and new entrants)
High absolute price → sharp single-name moves
critical.valuation: ~26x forward earnings is reasonable for +55% revenue growth; TradingView rates it Buy.

analyses.name: Howmet Aerospace Inc.
analyses.verdict: Picture-perfect industrial VCP near highs — aerospace super-cycle earnings with a restrained RSI.

financials.summary: Commercial-aerospace demand and pricing drove strong margin expansion; engine-parts and structures benefited from record build rates and aftermarket strength.

journey_52w.summary: A steady leadership uptrend all year; now in a tight VCP just 1.4% off its high with RSI a restrained ~54 — one of the cleanest bases on the board.

milestones.note: Aero build-rate recovery drove earnings higher

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: Tight consolidation just under highs

risks: 46x forward P/E prices in continued execution
critical.valuation: Premium multiple, but justified so far by +71% EPS growth; TradingView rates it Strong Buy.

analyses.name: Bank of America Corp.
analyses.verdict: Money-center bank breaking to new highs on the financials rotation — cheap, with TradingView Strong Buy confirmation.

financials.summary: Net interest income stabilized and turned higher while capital-markets and wealth revenue grew; credit stayed contained, driving solid EPS growth on an inexpensive valuation.

journey_52w.summary: Base-building for much of the year, then a decisive breakout to new highs as the financials group took leadership; RSI ~70 at the breakout.

milestones.note: NII trough and recovery narrative took hold

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: Breakout to new 52-week highs

critical.valuation: ~11.7x forward earnings is cheap for a franchise bank; TradingView rates it Strong Buy.

analyses.name: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
analyses.verdict: Best-in-class bank at new highs — fortress balance sheet leading the financials move, reasonably valued.

financials.summary: Diversified strength across markets, investment banking, and consumer drove double-digit revenue growth and ~47% EPS growth, with industry-leading returns on capital.

journey_52w.summary: Steady uptrend to fresh all-time highs; RSI ~64 leaves room, unlike some more-extended financials.

milestones.note: Diversified earnings strength drove new highs

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: New all-time highs with a healthy RSI

critical.valuation: ~14x forward earnings — reasonable for the highest-quality US bank; TradingView rates it Strong Buy.

analyses.name: EOG Resources, Inc.
analyses.verdict: Top-tier E&P at a very cheap multiple with a geopolitical oil tailwind — direct leverage to firmer crude.

financials.summary: Low-cost shale economics and disciplined capital allocation drove strong free cash flow and EPS growth; returns to shareholders stayed a priority even at moderate oil prices.

journey_52w.summary: Range-bound with oil, now firming ~8% off its high in a VCP with RSI ~55 as Strait-of-Hormuz risk puts a bid under crude.

milestones.note: Capital-discipline story kept FCF strong through oil swings

milestones.label: Mid-2026
milestones.note: Firming with geopolitical oil-price support

risks: Commodity-price dependent — a Hormuz de-escalation cools the trade
catalysts: Higher crude on Middle East risk
critical.valuation: ~9.4x forward earnings — cheap even before the oil tailwind; TradingView rates it Buy.

analyses.name: SpaceX (recent IPO)
analyses.verdict: New listing — trade the story (Starlink cash flow + Starship optionality), not the thin quant signals; still repairing post-IPO.

financials.summary: As a newly listed company, reported financials are limited; the investment case rests on Starlink's fast-growing, increasingly cash-generative subscriber business and the launch franchise's dominant market share, with Starship as long-dated optionality. Treat any figures as preliminary until full filings.
highlights: Revenue growth ~+15.4% YoY (early public data — preliminary)
Starlink subscriber and revenue scaling rapidly
Valuation extreme on near-term earnings (forward multiple ~150x)

accomplishments: Completed IPO (~22 trading days of history)
Record launch cadence and reusability milestones

journey_52w.summary: As a ~3-week-old listing there is no 52-week arc; shares are ~36% off their brief post-IPO high with RSI ~36 — typical post-IPO digestion. Breakout signals (52-week, VCP, RS) won't be meaningful for another 1-2 months.

milestones.label: IPO
milestones.note: Listed ~3 weeks ago; initial pop then pullback

milestones.label: Now
milestones.note: ~36% below the post-IPO high, RSI ~36 — basing

risks: New listing — no TradingView rating yet; thin trading history and lockup dynamics
watch: First reported quarter as a public company
Whether it can build a base above the IPO range
critical.valuation: Story stock — a ~150x forward multiple means the market is pricing Starlink + Starship optionality, not current earnings. New listing; size accordingly.
